page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369HB processors running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps to a dedicated physical core, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require dedicated CPU resources and high memory capacity. Suitable use cases include in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, and memory-heavy data processing applications.

It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration delivers dedicated compute resources and high memory density, making it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and data processing tasks.
